metadata.name: turf_vault
metadata.description: Solana contest escrow with on-chain currency registry and self-custodial entries

instructions.name: cancel_contest
docs: Refund the prize pool to the creator. Open / Locked → Cancelled. 2-of-3.

accounts.name: creator_token_account
docs: Creator's USDC ATA — destination of the prize pool refund.
Constrained to belong to the contest's creator (via token::authority).

instructions.name: close_contest
docs: Close a settled or cancelled contest's PDA + prize_pool ATA,
reclaiming rent to the admin. Sweeps residual prize_pool dust to
the operator-revenue USDC ATA first (decided 2026-05-27, §11 Q8).

accounts.name: prize_pool
docs: Prize pool ATA — closed in this instruction. Any residual balance
is swept to op_rev_usdc_ata first (decided §11 Q8).

accounts.name: op_rev_usdc_ata
docs: Operator-revenue USDC ATA — destination for any residual prize_pool
USDC. PDA-bound to the payout mint at [b"op_rev", payout_mint].

instructions.name: create_contest
docs: Create a new contest with a per-currency entry-fee schedule and a
USDC prize pool. Dual-signer: payer (admin bot, pays SOL rent) +
creator (Phantom wallet, signs prize-pool USDC transfer).

accounts.name: payer
docs: 1-of-3 vault signer — pays SOL rent for Contest PDA + prize_pool PDA.

accounts.name: creator
docs: Creator's wallet — signs USDC transfer for the prize pool.

accounts.name: prize_pool
docs: Per-contest USDC prize pool. PDA at [b"prize_pool", contest_id],
authority = vault_state. Drained on settle_contest, cancel_contest,
or close_contest (dust sweep).

accounts.name: payout_mint
docs: Must equal vault_state.payout_mint (canonical USDC).

accounts.name: creator_token_account
docs: Creator's USDC ATA — source of the prize pool.

instructions.name: create_season
docs: Create a Season with an immutable per-entry seed-award schedule.
1-of-3 vault signer.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Vault signer (admin) — pays SOL rent for the Season PDA.

instructions.name: create_user_account
docs: Create a new per-wallet UserAccount PDA. Permissionless payer.

instructions.name: deactivate_currency
docs: Flip `accepted_currencies[idx].active = 0`. The slot is never
reclaimed — preserves currency_idx stability. 2-of-3.

instructions.name: enter_contest
docs: Generic single-canonical entry handler. User signs an SPL transfer
from their ATA → the chosen currency's operator-revenue ATA. Creates
a ContestEntry PDA, awards seeds, increments stat counters.
Blocked when vault is paused.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Admin pays rent for the ContestEntry PDA.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user's wallet — signs the token transfer.

accounts.name: user_account
docs: Per-user stat counter PDA.

accounts.name: currency_mint
docs: The mint corresponding to `currency_idx`. Anchor's `token::mint`
constraints on the ATAs already gate this, but we still pull it in
so the user's ATA + op_rev_ata can be checked against the same mint.

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's ATA for the chosen currency.

accounts.name: op_rev_ata
docs: Operator-revenue ATA for the chosen currency.
PDA-seed-bind via [b"op_rev", currency_mint.key()].

accounts.name: season
docs: Pinned-season seed schedule (OPSEC-023).

instructions.name: enter_contest_with_token
docs: Entry funded by consuming an EntryTokenAccount instead of paying
any currency. Wallet co-signs (OPSEC-004). Blocked when vault is paused.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Admin pays rent for the ContestEntry PDA.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user's wallet — signs to authorize token consumption (OPSEC-004).

accounts.name: entry_token
docs: EntryTokenAccount being consumed to fund this entry.
Must be owned by `user` and not yet consumed.

accounts.name: season
docs: Pinned-season seed schedule (OPSEC-023).

instructions.name: initialize
docs: One-time setup of the singleton vault. Pins payout mint to USDC,
registers slot 0 (USDC) + slot 1 (USDT) in the currency registry,
stores the Squads vault PDA as treasury authority, and locks in the
multisig signer set + threshold. Only callable by INIT_AUTHORITY
on a mainnet build.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be INIT_AUTHORITY in mainnet builds (any signer in dev/test).
Pays SOL rent for VaultState + the two operator-revenue ATAs.

accounts.name: vault_state
docs: The new VaultState account. PDA at [b"vault"].
Zero-copy: size_of<VaultState>() instead of INIT_SPACE.

accounts.name: payout_mint
docs: Payout mint — pinned to canonical Circle USDC at mainnet build time.
Also registered as `accepted_currencies[0]`.

accounts.name: second_currency_mint
docs: Second accepted entry-fee currency (USDT). In mainnet builds,
pinned to EXPECTED_USDT_MINT. Registered as `accepted_currencies[1]`.

accounts.name: payout_op_rev_ata
docs: Operator-revenue ATA for the payout currency (USDC).
PDA at [b"op_rev", payout_mint.key()]. Authority = vault_state.

accounts.name: second_op_rev_ata
docs: Operator-revenue ATA for the second currency (USDT).
PDA at [b"op_rev", second_currency_mint.key()]. Authority = vault_state.

instructions.name: mint_entry_token
docs: Mint a new EntryTokenAccount for a user. 1-of-3 vault signer.
PDA is derived from sha256(source_ref) (v0.19, audit #9) — re-minting the
same source_ref collides on init for true on-chain idempotency.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Vault signer (admin) — pays SOL rent for the EntryTokenAccount PDA.

accounts.name: user_wallet
docs: account (NOT a PDA seed in v0.19). Not a signer; not modified.

instructions.name: pause
docs: Emergency stop: blocks enter_contest{,_with_token}. 2-of-3. `reason`
is logged on-chain (UTF-8 zero-padded to 64 bytes).

instructions.name: register_currency
docs: Add a currency to `accepted_currencies` at the first empty slot.
Creates the per-currency operator-revenue ATA. 2-of-3.

accounts.name: op_rev_ata
docs: Per-currency operator-revenue ATA. Anchor's `init` rejects this if
the PDA already exists, which gives us defense in depth against
re-registering a previously-deactivated mint (the ATA still exists).

instructions.name: set_contest_conclusion_time
docs: Set (or clear) a contest's conclusion timestamp (v0.18). 1-of-3. Once
chain time passes it the contest has concluded — set_contest_lock_time
then rejects. `new_conclusion_timestamp == 0` clears it. Rejected once
the contest has already concluded or is settled/cancelled.

accounts.name: cosigner
docs: Optional second vault signer. Required (2-of-3) ONLY to amend an
already-set conclusion; omitted for the initial 1-of-3 set.

instructions.name: set_contest_lock_time
docs: Set (or clear) a contest's derived lock timestamp. 1-of-3.
`new_lock_timestamp == 0` clears the lock (enterable indefinitely); any
non-zero Unix-seconds value locks entries once chain time passes it.
"Lock now" = pass the current chain time. Rejected once the contest is
concluded (interim guard: Settled/Cancelled).

accounts.name: cosigner
docs: Optional second vault signer. Required (2-of-3) ONLY to amend a lock
that has already passed; omitted for a routine pre-lock set (1-of-3).

instructions.name: set_username
docs: Set / overwrite the username on a UserAccount. Owner signs.

instructions.name: settle_contest
docs: Grade a contest. Per-winner SPL transfer from the contest's USDC
prize-pool PDA → winner's USDC ATA. 2-of-3.

accounts.name: prize_pool
docs: Contest's USDC prize pool PDA — source of payouts.

instructions.name: sweep_operator_revenue
docs: Drain a per-currency operator-revenue ATA to the pinned treasury
wallet's ATA. `amount = 0` sweeps all. 2-of-3.

accounts.name: op_rev_ata
docs: Operator-revenue ATA for the given currency.
PDA-bound to [b"op_rev", currency_mint.key()].

accounts.name: treasury_ata
docs: Destination ATA — treasury wallet's ATA for this currency.
`treasury_ata.owner` is verified in the handler against
`vault_state.treasury_authority` (Squads vault PDA).

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Lift the emergency stop. 2-of-3.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only the vault admin can perform this action

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Token mint is not accepted by this vault

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance for this operation

errors.name: ContestNotOpen
errors.msg: Contest is not open for entries

errors.name: ContestFull
errors.msg: Contest is full

errors.name: ContestNotSettled
errors.msg: Contest has not been settled

errors.name: ContestAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Contest is already settled

errors.name: DuplicateEntry
errors.msg: User already entered this contest with this entry number

errors.name: SettlementOverflow
errors.msg: Settlement payouts exceed prize pool

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidPayoutTiers
errors.msg: Payout amounts must sum to prize_pool amount

errors.name: AccountAlreadyMigrated
errors.msg: Account is already larger than expected — cannot migrate

errors.name: InvalidAccountData
errors.msg: Account data is invalid or has wrong discriminator

errors.name: InvalidThreshold
errors.msg: Invalid threshold: must be 1-3

errors.name: DuplicateSigner
errors.msg: Duplicate signer in signers array

errors.name: EntryTokenAlreadyConsumed
errors.msg: Entry token has already been consumed

errors.name: EntryTokenWrongOwner
errors.msg: Entry token owner does not match the wallet entering the contest

errors.name: SignerContinuityRequired
errors.msg: New signer set must retain at least one current cosigner

errors.name: VaultPaused
errors.msg: Vault is paused — user-facing funds operations are temporarily disabled

errors.name: WithdrawDailyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Withdrawal would exceed the per-user daily cap

errors.name: UsernameReserved
errors.msg: Username uses a reserved prefix

errors.name: UsernameInvalidChars
errors.msg: Username contains characters that are not printable ASCII (0x20..0x7E)

errors.name: UsernameTooShort
errors.msg: Username must be at least 3 characters

errors.name: CurrencyAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Currency mint is already registered in the vault registry

errors.name: CurrencyRegistryFull
errors.msg: Vault currency registry is full

errors.name: InvalidCurrencyIndex
errors.msg: Currency index is out of range or refers to an unused slot

errors.name: CurrencyNotActive
errors.msg: Currency is registered but deactivated

errors.name: EntryFeeNotSet
errors.msg: Contest does not accept this currency (entry fee is zero)

errors.name: ContestNotLocked
errors.msg: Contest is not locked

errors.name: ContestNotCancellable
errors.msg: Contest cannot be cancelled in its current status

errors.name: PrizePoolNotEmpty
errors.msg: Prize pool account still holds tokens — cannot close contest

errors.name: EmptyRevenueAccount
errors.msg: Operator-revenue account is empty — nothing to sweep

errors.name: TreasuryAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Treasury ATA owner does not match the pinned treasury authority

errors.name: FeeAndPrizeBothZero
errors.msg: Contest must have at least one entry fee or a non-zero prize pool

errors.name: ContestLocked
errors.msg: Contest is locked — the lock timestamp has passed

errors.name: ContestConcluded
errors.msg: Contest has concluded — the conclusion timestamp has passed

errors.name: InvalidPayoutDestination
errors.msg: Settlement payout destination is not the winner's associated token account

errors.name: InvalidTimestamp
errors.msg: Invalid contest timestamp: must be non-negative, in the future, and lock must precede conclusion

errors.name: EntryTokenSeedMismatch
errors.msg: Entry token seed hash does not match sha256(source_ref)

types.name: AcceptedCurrency
docs: One slot in the on-chain currency registry. `mint == Pubkey::default()`
means the slot is unused. `active == 0` means the slot is registered
but disabled for new entries / new contests (slot is never reclaimed —
preserves currency_idx stability across the program's life).
`kind` is an operator tag (0 = stablecoin, 1 = sol-wrapped, etc.) —
informational only, never consulted by program logic. `_pad` reserves
14 bytes for future fields (per-currency fee-cap, display ticker, etc.).
Zero-copy (Pod-safe): `active` is u8 (0/1) rather than bool — bool is
not Pod-safe because non-{0,1} byte values cause undefined behavior.
We provide unsafe Pod + Zeroable impls so this struct can sit inside
`VaultState`'s `accepted_currencies: [AcceptedCurrency; 16]` and be
re-interpreted from the account's raw bytes via bytemuck.

fields.name: mint
docs: SPL mint for this currency. `Pubkey::default()` for unused slots.

fields.name: op_rev_ata
docs: Per-currency operator-revenue ATA (PDA at [b"op_rev", mint]).

fields.name: kind
docs: Operator tag (0 = stablecoin, 1 = sol-wrapped, ...). Informational.

fields.name: active
docs: 1 == active; 0 == deactivated. Flip to 0 via `deactivate_currency`.
u8 instead of bool for Pod safety (zero-copy compatibility).

fields.name: _pad
docs: Reserved padding for forward-compat. 14 bytes brings the struct to
80 bytes total for clean alignment + future field expansion.

types.name: Contest
docs: One per contest. Holds the per-currency entry-fee schedule, accumulated
per-currency fee tallies (operator revenue, separate from prize pool),
payout tiers, status, season binding, and the creator/admin pubkeys.
PDA seeds: [b"contest", contest_id]  (contest_id = SHA256 of Rails slug)

fields.name: contest_id
docs: SHA256(Rails slug). Stable, opaque, 32 bytes.

fields.name: admin
docs: Payer pubkey from create_contest (admin bot, pays SOL rent).

fields.name: creator
docs: Creator pubkey (signs the prize_pool USDC transfer from their ATA).

fields.name: season_id
docs: Season this contest is bound to (OPSEC-023). Pins the seed schedule.

fields.name: prize_pool
docs: USDC prize pool — pre-funded by creator at create time. Immutable.

fields.name: entry_fee_by_currency
docs: Per-currency entry-fee schedule. `entry_fee_by_currency[i] = 0`
means currency `i` is NOT accepted for this contest.

fields.name: entry_fees
docs: Per-currency collected fees (operator revenue). Increments by the
fee on every paid entry of currency `i`.

fields.name: max_entries
docs: Maximum number of entries this contest accepts.

fields.name: current_entries
docs: Number of entries currently in the contest.

fields.name: status
docs: Current lifecycle state.

fields.name: payout_amounts
docs: USDC paid per rank, 6-decimal. Must sum to `prize_pool`. Max 10 ranks.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: lock_timestamp
docs: Derived time-lock (Unix seconds, chain Clock). `now >= lock_timestamp`
⇒ contest locked (no new entries). `0` = no lock scheduled (enterable
until a lock time is set). Carved out of the former `[u8; 32]`
`_reserved` padding (i64 = 8 bytes, `_reserved` 32 → 24) so total
`INIT_SPACE` is UNCHANGED — existing Contest PDAs need no re-init:
their zeroed reserved bytes decode as `lock_timestamp == 0`.

fields.name: conclusion_timestamp
docs: Derived conclusion marker (Unix seconds, chain Clock). `now >=
conclusion_timestamp` ⇒ the contest has concluded: its lock time can no
longer change (`set_contest_lock_time` rejects). `0` = no conclusion
scheduled. Carved out of `_reserved` (32 → 24 → 16) so total
`INIT_SPACE` stays UNCHANGED — v0.17 Contest PDAs need no re-init
(their zeroed bytes decode as `conclusion_timestamp == 0`).

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved padding for forward-compat.

types.name: ContestEntry
docs: One per (contest, wallet, entry_num). A user can have multiple entries
per contest (Rails caps at 3); each gets its own PDA.
PDA seeds: [b"entry", contest_id, wallet.as_ref(), entry_num.to_le_bytes()]

fields.name: currency_idx
docs: Index into `vault_state.accepted_currencies` of the currency this
entry was paid in. `u8::MAX` is the sentinel for token-funded entries
(no SPL transfer occurred).

types.name: ContestStatus
docs: Lifecycle of a Contest.
Open      — accepting entries (locking is now DERIVED from
`lock_timestamp` vs chain time, not this status — see
set_contest_lock_time + the enter_contest time gate)
Locked    — vestigial (v0.17 retired lock_contest/unlock_contest); kept
for enum-discriminant stability. No instruction sets it.
Settled   — graded, payouts disbursed
Cancelled — refunded to creator, no further state transitions allowed

types.name: EntryStatus
docs: Status of a single contest entry. Settle transitions Active → Won/Lost.

types.name: EntryTokenAccount
docs: EntryTokenAccount: a pre-purchased contest entry token issued by the admin.
User redeems one of these to enter a contest without paying the entry fee at entry time.
PDA seeds (v0.19, audit #9): [b"entry_token", sha256(source_ref)]. Derived
from the external reference's hash so re-minting the same `source_ref`
collides on init (true idempotency); replaces the old caller-supplied
`sequence`. `source_ref` must be globally unique across wallets.
Discovery: getProgramAccounts filter by `owner` (still in the account body).

types.name: Season
docs: Season: a contest season with a per-entry seed-award schedule.
The schedule is set at season creation and is immutable thereafter.
Entries award `seed_schedule[entry_num.min(4) as usize]` — entries 5+
clamp to slot 4.
PDA seeds: [b"season", season_id.to_le_bytes()] (u32 LE, 4 bytes).

types.name: Settlement
docs: `settle_contest` — grade a contest, disburse USDC payouts.
For each Settlement entry, performs an SPL transfer of `payout` USDC
from the contest's prize_pool PDA → the winner's USDC ATA (signed by
vault_state PDA), then updates the ContestEntry and UserAccount stats.
remaining_accounts pattern: per settlement, 3 accounts in order:
[user_account_pda, contest_entry_pda, winner_usdc_ata]
Validation:
- 2-of-3 multisig (constraint).
- contest.status is Open or Locked.
- payout_mint == vault_state.payout_mint (USDC pin).
- sum(payouts) <= contest.prize_pool. Entry fees are NOT included
anymore — they sit in op_rev ATAs, separate from the prize pool.
- No duplicate (wallet, entry_num) in the vec.
- remaining_accounts.len() == settlements.len() * 3.
Per winner:
- SPL Transfer (PDA-signed): prize_pool → winner_usdc_ata.
- ContestEntry: status Active → Won (if payout > 0) or Lost.
- UserAccount: total_won += payout, cashes += (payout > 0),
wins += (rank == 1).
Final: contest.status = Settled.
CU budget: roughly 5k base + 7k per winner; ≤ 25 winners fits the
default 200k budget. Rails sets `set_compute_unit_limit(400_000)`
on every settle TX (decided §11 Q7).
VaultState is zero-copy (v0.16). Vault is read via `load()?` for
signer-seed derivation; the multisig check stays in the constraint.

types.name: UserAccount
docs: One per user wallet. Holds on-chain stat counters (entries / wins /
cashes / total_won) plus the loyalty seeds counter and the user's
chosen display name. v0.16 dropped the custodial balance / deposit /
withdraw / daily-cap fields — funds now live in user ATAs.
PDA seeds: [b"user", wallet.as_ref()]

fields.name: wallet
docs: Owner wallet.

fields.name: username
docs: On-chain master copy of the user's display name. UTF-8 zero-padded.

fields.name: seeds
docs: Loyalty points awarded per entry from the contest's Season schedule.
Rails derives "level" client-side from this value.

fields.name: entries
docs: Lifetime contests entered. Increments on every successful entry.

fields.name: wins
docs: Lifetime 1st-place finishes (rank == 1 in settle_contest).

fields.name: cashes
docs: Lifetime any-payout finishes (payout > 0 in settle_contest).

fields.name: total_won
docs: Lifetime USDC payouts received. Increments by `payout` on settle.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved padding for forward-compat (referral, kyc tier, etc.).

types.name: VaultState
docs: Singleton vault account. Holds the 2-of-3 multisig signer set, the
pinned payout mint (USDC), the per-currency registry, a treasury
authority pin (Squads vault PDA), and a pause flag.
PDA seeds: [b"vault"]
Zero-copy: VaultState is too large (~1475 data bytes) to deserialize
onto BPF's 4KB stack via borsh. Anchor's `#[account(zero_copy)]` maps
the account data buffer directly as a typed reference via bytemuck::Pod,
avoiding the full-struct stack alloc that borsh's deserialize_reader
would perform.
`paused` is u8 (0/1) rather than bool for Pod safety.

fields.name: signers
docs: The three multisig signers. 1-of-3 can run routine ops; 2-of-3
needed for treasury ops (settle, register/deactivate_currency,
cancel_contest, sweep_operator_revenue, pause/unpause).

fields.name: threshold
docs: Number of distinct signatures required for treasury ops. Currently 2.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: paused
docs: Emergency pause flag. When 1, enter_contest and
enter_contest_with_token return VaultPaused. Other ops remain
available so operators can wind down in-flight state.
u8 instead of bool for Pod safety (zero-copy compatibility).

fields.name: payout_mint
docs: Payout mint — pinned at `initialize`, immutable thereafter.
All `settle_contest` / `cancel_contest` / `close_contest` flows
constrain this. In a mainnet build, must equal EXPECTED_USDC_MINT.

fields.name: treasury_authority
docs: Squads vault PDA — pinned at `initialize`. `sweep_operator_revenue`
enforces `treasury_ata.owner == treasury_authority`, so leaked admin
keys can't drain swept revenue elsewhere.

fields.name: accepted_currencies
docs: On-chain currency registry. Slot 0 holds the payout currency (USDC),
slot 1 holds USDT, slots 2-15 are populated via `register_currency`.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved padding for forward-compat (governance, fee policy, etc.).
